text:
Bolt is unbroken (i.e. full), the sky clear, the Sun's rays
{unerring) dark and the other rays glossy (clear or bright), the rain-
bow white, lightning flashing in the north-east, and the tree«shaped
cloud glossy or embraced by the Sun's rays all round, there will be
rain. The same will happen, if a huge cloud covers the Sun at
setting.
[This is a beautiful piece of descriptive poetry. In the third
line there is the 'poetic excellence' called Sanmdhi, inasmuch as we
get here the idea of a person embracing his friend warmly.
The metre is
The country where the Sun appears partial, crooked, black,
small and rough or marked with the figures of crows and other-
inauspicious things, will probably lose its monarch.
[Cf. rnf—

If groups of carnivorous birds should follow the army of a king
wishing to attack his enemy, his army would take to its heels; if the
birds fly in front, he would be victorious.
